# terrible_community_general_selinux_permissive (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `domain` (String) The domain that is added or removed from the list of permissive domains.
- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `permissive` (Boolean) Indicate if the domain should or should not be set as permissive.

### Optional

- `no_reload` (Boolean) Disable reloading of the SELinux policy after making change to a domain's permissive setting. The default is `false`, which causes policy to be reloaded when a domain changes state. Reloading the policy does not work on older versions of the `policycoreutils-python` library, for example in EL 6.".
- `store` (String) Name of the SELinux policy store to use.
